message:
test(asserts): [7k7pl batch 4] pin content + schema in e2e search tests

Upgrade 5 presence-only assertions in the e2e search tests to pin
exact content and JSON schema shape, so regressions producing
non-empty-but-wrong output fail loudly instead of slipping past
`.is_some()` / `!is_empty()` probes.

- e2e_semantic_search.rs (search_semantic_mode_returns_results):
  pin `hits` as a JSON array, not just "field present".
- e2e_semantic_search.rs (search_approximate_uses_hnsw): same pin.
- e2e_search_index.rs (force_rebuild_recreates_index): assert at
  least one hit's content contains the seeded
  `rebuild_test_initial` token. Catches force-rebuild returning
  unrelated content.
- e2e_search_index.rs (search_wildcard_query): assert at least one
  hit's content contains `wildcardtest_unique_suffix`. Catches
  wildcard falling back to match-all.
- e2e_search_index.rs (empty_query_returns_recent): pin every
  returned hit's shape — both `content` and `source_path` must be
  non-null strings. Catches malformed-hit regressions.

Verified green: force_rebuild_recreates_index,
search_wildcard_query, empty_query_returns_recent, and
search_semantic_mode_returns_results all pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
